notable_phrases: we continue to spend a tremendous amount of time and effort on artificial intelligence
we have set a new record for our install base, which has now surpassed 2.2 billion active devices
we will continue to grow double digits at a percentage that is similar to what we reported for the December quarter
summary: Apple reported record results with strong services growth and international expansion while emphasizing upcoming Vision Pro launch and AI investments, though facing headwinds in China and cautious guidance for March quarter.
change_flags: Forward guidance sentiment decreased by 10.00; Analyst pushback level increased by 16.00
change_summary: vs 2023 Q4: Forward guidance sentiment decreased by 10.00; Analyst pushback level increased by 16.00.
